sourceOverview.notes: TTS leader in quality. 29+ languages, voice cloning, dubbing. STT: Scribe (96.7% English accuracy).

audit.priceRangeSummary: Credit-based pricing; TTS generally consumes credits per character and STT per second/minute of audio depending on plan.
audit.limitsSummary: Voice Library API and some advanced features are unavailable on free. Voice IDs are separate from model IDs. Large voice catalog (5,000+ voices).
audit.regionSummary: ElevenLabs cloud; EU/US enterprise controls may vary by plan.
audit.appIntegrationNotes: Model ID and voice ID are distinct. For your app, store both because end users will often select a voice, not just a TTS engine.

supplementalResearch.title: 38. ElevenLabs (US) — TTS ✓ STT ✓
supplementalResearch.markdown:
### 38. ElevenLabs (US) — TTS ✓ STT ✓

**Status:** Active. Industry-leading TTS quality.

**TTS models:** `eleven_v3` (**70+ languages**, 5,000 chars max, most expressive), `eleven_multilingual_v2` (29 languages, 10,000 chars), `eleven_flash_v2_5` (32 languages, 40,000 chars, ~75ms latency). Business pricing: Flash $0.06/1K chars ($60/1M), Multilingual $0.12/1K chars ($120/1M). 5,000+ preset voices. Voice cloning (instant + professional).

**STT:** `scribe_v2` (90+ languages, >98% accuracy, diarization up to 32 speakers, $0.22–$0.40/hr), `scribe_v2_realtime` (~150ms latency).

**Free tier:** 10,000 chars/month TTS + 2.5 hrs STT. No commercial use.

REST + WebSocket streaming. GDPR compliant. SOC 2. EU/US/India data residency (Enterprise).

extractedBlocks.freeTier: 10,000 chars/month TTS + 2.5 hrs STT. No commercial use.
